steps.title: Use the origin clue
steps.content: The passage says African languages contributed to the Puerto Rican dialect. The blank appears in the phrase "can be ___ to," so it needs a word that shows a pronunciation can be attributed to an origin.

steps.title: Test the idiom
steps.content: Choice B means handed over, Choice C means publicly declared, and Choice D means presented or given. The remaining word completes the idiom meaning "attributed to a source." The answer is A.
